app.title: Satellite Tracker – Live Map of Starlink and 30k Satellites
app.author: rolph
app.description: Live map of Starlink and 30k satellites, visualizing satellite orbits and positions
proposed_tests: Install using npm, visualize satellites on map
Add new satellite, verify tracking functionality
Optimize map loading speed, measure FPS
